name.description: The name of the cell line

owner_id.description: The ID of the owner - by default it's your member id

organism.description: The organism from which the cells were originated

tissue.description: The tissue from which the cells were extracted

medium_and_serum.description: A supplement used for cultivating cells

source.description: The location or environment from which the cells were originated

description.description: A detailed description of the cell line
